Selected `gemini-flash` for the correct description 'Cash at Bankers c/s.' and the accurate reading of the pounds value as 5716 (digit '6' is clear in the image). `gpt-5-mini` misread the pounds as 5715 and omitted 'c/s.'.
Selected `gemini-flash` for the correct description 'Litigacy Account L.G.'. Amounts were in consensus.

Values extracted are in consensus. `gemini-flash`'s note correctly identifies a discrepancy between the calculated sum of its entries (5953.0.4) and the ledger's written total (5952.0.4), indicating a potential ledger error. `gpt-5-mini`'s note claims a match, but its prior entry for pounds was incorrect (5715 instead of 5716).

Visual inspection confirms 'Furniture' is a section header with no associated monetary amount on that line. `gemini-flash` is correct. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted a monetary amount and classified it as an entry.

Visual inspection confirms 'Investments' is a section header with no associated monetary amount on that line. `gemini-flash` is correct. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted a monetary amount and classified it as an entry.

This row was present in `gemini-flash` but was entirely missing from `gpt-5-mini` as a distinct entry. Visual verification confirms its existence and the correct extraction by `gemini-flash` (3000 pounds, zero shillings, zero pence).

Selected `gemini-flash`. `gpt-5-mini` did not extract this specific line as a distinct entry; it incorrectly merged an amount into the 'Investments' header and misread the pounds value (6511 vs 6011).

Selected `gemini-flash` as it accurately reads the ledger's written total of 9571 pounds. `gpt-5-mini` misread the pounds digit as '1' instead of '7' (9511 vs 9571) and its arithmetic check was based on its own incorrect previous extractions.
Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Selected `gemini-flash`'s description for exact match to the trailing hyphen as seen in the image.

Values extracted are in consensus. Both extractors correctly calculated the sum of their preceding entries. `gemini-flash`'s note is more reliable as its preceding entries were correctly extracted.

Visual inspection shows the date 'March 8.th 1901' on its own line. `gpt-5-mini` correctly isolated the date, while `gemini-flash` incorrectly merged the auditor's name onto this line. Refined description for exact match to '8.th' from the image.

This line, 'W.C. Jackson F.C.A.', is distinctly separate in the image, following the date. `gemini-flash` correctly read the text content but incorrectly merged it into the date line. `gpt-5-mini` made a separate row (row 25) but misread the text entirely ('W.C. Tacktad F.C.O.'). This row is added as a new distinct row based on visual verification and the correct text from `gemini-flash`.

Selected `gemini-flash` (row 28) for the accurate reading of the firm's address. `gpt-5-mini` (row 26) misread this line entirely ('Jackson Ridley Browning'). Visual verification confirms `gemini-flash`'s reading.
Amounts are in consensus. Selected `gpt-5-mini` for correctly including the '£' symbol in the description, as seen preceding the total amount in the ledger. `gemini-flash` left the description empty.
